title: clematis dioica var. normalis
intro: Clematis dioica var. normalis, also known as Sweet Autumn Clematis, is a flowering vine native to Europe, Asia, and North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sweet Autumn Clematis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
